task_context.actionable_question: Am I studying steadily or only before exams?
task_context.ai_prompt_hint: Distinguish 'steady learner' from 'pre-exam crammer'. Recommend a consistent weekly routine.

explanation.raw_text:
Summary: Your engagement with the course shows some fluctuations, indicating that you may not be studying steadily throughout the weeks. There are notable drops in activity, especially in certain weeks, which suggest that you might be cramming before exams rather than maintaining a consistent study routine.

Insights: Significant Drop in Weekly Clicks: In week 2, your weekly clicks dropped to 4, which is a significant decrease compared to the previous week (94 clicks). This suggests a lack of engagement during that period. | Inconsistent Engagement: Your weekly clicks vary greatly, with some weeks showing high activity (like week 1 with 98 clicks) and others very low (like week 18 with just 1 click). This inconsistency indicates that you may not be studying regularly.

Educational implications: Regular study habits can lead to better retention and understanding of the material.

Recommendations: high - Establish a consistent weekly study schedule. - This will help you maintain steady engagement and reduce the need to cram before exams.

There are notable drops in activity, especially in certain weeks, which suggest that you might be cramming before exams rather than maintaining a consistent study routine.

insights.title: Significant Drop in Weekly Clicks
insights.description: In week 2, your weekly clicks dropped to 4, which is a significant decrease compared to the previous week (94 clicks). This suggests a lack of engagement during that period.

insights.title: Inconsistent Engagement
insights.description: Your weekly clicks vary greatly, with some weeks showing high activity (like week 1 with 98 clicks) and others very low (like week 18 with just 1 click). This inconsistency indicates that you may not be studying regularly.

educational_implications: Regular study habits can lead to better retention and understanding of the material.

recommendations.action: Establish a consistent weekly study schedule.
recommendations.rationale: This will help you maintain steady engagement and reduce the need to cram before exams.

confidence.reason: The data shows clear patterns of engagement and activity levels over time.

required_core_outputs.description: Characterise the observed study pattern as steady or concentrated before assessments when evidence supports that distinction.

required_supporting_outputs.description: Recommend a consistent weekly routine grounded in the observed study pattern.

evaluation_requirements.safety_fairness_note: Conservative pilot default; human review is required before any not_applicable exception.
